metadata.name: Colorado Entity Details
metadata.description: Extract entity details from Colorado SOS details page

variables.name: certifiedDocumentsViewerUrl
variables.description: CertificationViewer.do URL extracted from certificate print page

variables.name: certifiedDocumentsLocalPath
variables.description: Proxy URL for the certified documents PDF after upload to blob storage

actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('td.entity_conf_table_header')); const detailsHeader = headers.find(h => normalize(h.textContent) === 'Details'); if (!detailsHeader) return null; const table = detailsHeader.closest('table'); if (!table) return null; const data = {}; for (const row of table.rows) { const ths = row.querySelectorAll('th'); const tds = row.querySelectorAll('td:not(.entity_conf_table_header)'); if (ths.length === 1 && tds.length >= 1) { const key = normalize(ths[0].textContent); if (!(key in data)) { data[key] = normalize(tds[0].textContent); } } else if (ths.length >= 2 && tds.length >= 2) { const key0 = normalize(ths[0].textContent); const key1 = normalize(ths[1].textContent); if (!(key0 in data)) { data[key0] = normalize(tds[0].textContent); } if (!(key1 in data)) { data[key1] = normalize(tds[1].textContent); } } } return JSON.stringify({ name: data['Name'] || data['Entity Name'] || '', status: data['Status'] || '', formationDate: data['Formation date'] || data['Formation Date'] || data['Date of Formation'] || '', idNumber: data['ID number'] || data['ID Number'] || data['Entity Id Number'] || '', form: data['Form'] || data['Entity Form'] || '', periodicReportMonth: data['Periodic report month'] || data['Periodic Report Month'] || null, jurisdiction: data['Jurisdiction'] || data['Jurisdiction of Organization'] || '', principalOfficeStreetAddress: data['Principal office street address'] || data['Principal Office Street Address'] || null, principalOfficeMailingAddress: data['Principal office mailing address'] || data['Principal Office Mailing Address'] || null }); }

actions.description: Extract idNumber into a top-level variable for certificate filename
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('td.entity_conf_table_header')); const h = headers.find(h => normalize(h.textContent) === 'Details'); if (!h) return ''; const table = h.closest('table'); if (!table) return ''; for (const row of table.rows) { const th = row.querySelector('th'); const td = row.querySelector('td:not(.entity_conf_table_header)'); if (th && td) { const key = normalize(th.textContent); if (key === 'ID number' || key === 'ID Number' || key === 'Entity Id Number') return normalize(td.textContent); } } return ''; }

() => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('td.entity_conf_table_header')); const agentHeader = headers.find(h => normalize(h.textContent) === 'Registered Agent'); if (!agentHeader) return null; const table = agentHeader.closest('table'); if (!table) return null; const data = {}; for (const row of table.rows) { const th = row.querySelector('th'); const td = row.querySelector('td:not(.entity_conf_table_header)'); if (th && td) { const key = normalize(th.textContent); if (!(key in data)) { data[key] = normalize(td.textContent); } } } return JSON.stringify({ name: data['Name'] || data['Agent Name'] || null, streetAddress: data['Street address'] || data['Street Address'] || data['Registered Agent Street Address'] || null, mailingAddress: data['Mailing address'] || data['Mailing Address'] || data['Registered Agent Mailing Address'] || null }); }

actions.description: Download certificate of good standing if available
actions.linkSelector: a:has-text('certificate of good standing'), a:has-text('Certificate of Good Standing')

condition.selector: a:has-text('certificate of good standing'), a:has-text('Certificate of Good Standing')

actions.description: Click 'Get certified copies of documents' link to navigate to document list

target.description: Get certified copies of documents link

actions.description: Click 'All documents' link to navigate to certificate print page
Extract CertificationViewer.do URL from 'open your form in a new window' link
actions.javascript: () => { const link = document.querySelector("a[href*='CertificationViewer.do']"); if (!link) return ''; const href = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; return href.startsWith('http') ? href : new URL(href, window.location.href).toString(); }
